data.content: OpenCode harness follow-up complete: approval records now hydrate from the terminal backend into the approvals tab, the approval UI avoids the unstable pending-approval selector crash, and the manual harness now disables the hotkey overlay, waits for approval POST completion, scopes clicks to the active approval id, and handles bounded follow-up approvals/replayed markers. Live harness passed for opencode-openrouter-z-ai-glm-5-1: first request approved, two follow-up approvals approved, continuation marker observed, validation file verified. Full gates passed: bun run lint; bunx tsc --noEmit --pretty false; bun run test; bun run build.
